What to Expect

Everything you need to know
before your recording

We keep it relaxed and conversational. No scripts, no surprise questions — just a real discussion about the topics you know best.

30–45 Minute Session

Focused, conversational recordings that respect your time at a busy conference.

On-Site at the Show

Find us at the VMware booth in the Hub. Your booking confirmation will include exact location details.

No Script Required

Come as you are. We'll share a few topic prompts in advance so you can prepare naturally.

Published Globally

Episodes go live on Spotify, Apple Podcasts, YouTube, and the Virtually Speaking feed.

Social Amplification

We'll share audiograms and clips you can repost on LinkedIn after the episode drops.

Reviewed Before Publishing

You'll have a chance to flag anything before the episode goes live. No surprises.

About the Show

Real conversations about VMware, VCF, and the future of enterprise cloud

Virtually Speaking brings together practitioners, architects, and leaders from across the VMware and Broadcom ecosystem to talk about what's actually happening in enterprise infrastructure — the wins, the challenges, and what's coming next.

Whether you're a longtime VMware customer, a partner, or a Broadcom insider, there's a seat at the table for you.

Spotify Apple Podcasts YouTube
3,000+ Listeners per episode
200+ Episodes published
3 Recording days at Explore
Global VCF audience reach

Co-Host · Broadcom / VCF

How It Works

Book in 3 easy steps

1

Pick a Time

Choose an available slot from the booking calendar that fits your conference schedule.

2

Share Your Topic

Tell us your focus area and a few talking points so we can prep great questions.

3

Show Up & Record

Find us on the show floor, grab a seat, and let's have a great conversation.

Popular Topics

What our guests talk about

Have a different angle? Bring it. We're open to any topic that matters to the VMware and VCF community.
